_comment: Device registry — source of truth for device -> antenna -> filter -> band -> domain -> endpoint. Replaces the RF switch. The pi-acquisition provisioner iterates `present: true` devices only; flip present + re-apply to join a new tuner. See docs/acquisition_tier.md and docs/PLATFORM_V2_ARCHITECTURE.md.

_antenna_ports._comment: RSPdx-R2 is a single tuner with 3 software-selectable antenna inputs (one band at a time). 'antenna'/'feed'/'filter' above describe the ACTIVE port (A, the FM job). Ports B and C are an interim antenna farm covering roles slated for dedicated hardware: B -> NOAA/Meteor (rtl-v4), C -> AM broadcast (hf-plus). Until the V1-hybrid FM job stops owning this device, B/C are physical-readiness only.
_antenna_ports.Antenna C: AM loop + inline choke — interim AM broadcast

rtl-2838._comment: INTERIM scanner source — the existing Nooelec RTL2838 that ran SDRTrunk on the Pi until the 2026-06 P25 offload. Serves the scanner domain over SoapyRemote (same transport the R2 will use) until the Airspy R2 arrives; then flip this to present:false and airspy-r2 to true in the same change. Single client = rack op25; the Pi-side monitor/manual-tune rtl_fm jobs lose the dongle while this is present.
